source.title: A New Model for the Absorption Coefficient of Narrow-Gap (Hg,Cd)Te That Simultaneously Considers Band Tails and Band Filling

exactly_recoverable_primitives.name: urbach_width_temperature_law
exactly_recoverable_primitives.notation_boundary: source E_p is permanent broadening, not Kane energy

blocked_components.reason: The 1993 paper invokes prior formulations and does not reproduce a self-contained equation with all conventions and parameters.
The quasi-Fermi-level coupling and numerical implementation used for pumped absorption and luminescence are not self-contained in the recovered source.
The continuity condition requires the missing complete Kane branch; the transition energy cannot be inferred from the explicit tail equation alone.

blocked_components.component: full Herrmann edge fit on repository spectra
blocked_components.reason: Substituting a surrogate Kane law would create an undocumented hybrid operator and falsely label it as Herrmann 1993.

precursor_source.title: Broadening mechanisms near the E0 transition in narrow-gap Hg1-xCdxTe
precursor_source.priority: highest remaining source request for full-operator reconstruction

decision.reason: The recovered 1993 primary paper supports three exact mathematical primitives, but not a reproducible complete absorption operator. The repository must preserve that distinction rather than fill missing equations with assumptions.
